prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-POCKETGOLDKIT-11PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Fine Gold Recovery Accessories Tools Kit in Clear Waterproof Hardcase Description: Get in on the gold rush with ASR Outdoors 11pc Clear Pocket Portable Travel Gold Panning Kit for Gold Mineral Gem Stone Precious Metals Recovery. This portable pocket gold panning kit focuses on mineral, gem stone, precious metal and gold flake or gold nugget recovery. With all the tools you need to extract, assess and store after panning your gold concentrates. Your gold recovery kit includes:

(1) clear hardcase (black rope lanyard included)
(1) black sand magnetic separator pen tool
(1) magnifying tweezers
(2) gold suction water tweezers
(4) glass storage vials

(1) magnifying loupe

The ASR Outdoor pocket gold panning recovery kit conveniently fits all the gold prospecting equipment and tools in the included hard plastic clear carrying case for secure and compact storage; the case also comes with a black rope lanyard for easy carrying or for attaching to other equipment or field gear. The small size of this 11-piece gold panning kit, measuring just 4.5 inches wide by 6 inches tall, makes it incredibly travel friendly and easy to tote. So, whether you're making your way to a local gold mining site or planning a gold prospecting road trip adventure, the pocket gold panning gold recovery kit will easily fit into any equipment bag, backpack or travel bag.

Importantly, all the equipment in this mineral recovery gold panning kit is made from quality material; from the metal magnifying tweezers, to the high-impact plastic clear hard case, all these gold mining tools will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come.

Happy prospecting, we hope you strike it rich. Search Terms: gold rush panning prospecting supplies mining tools equipment pans coins outdoor hobbies pick up plastic pipette dropper jewelers jewelry making glass vials kit loupes Features: - GOLD MINERAL GEM STONE RECOVERY KIT: This ASR Outdoor portable pocket gold panning kit focuses on mineral, gem stone, precious metal and gold recovery with all the tools you need to extract, assess and store after panning and classifying; the ASR Outdoor 11pc Clear Pocket Portable Travel Gold Panning Kit includes a handy lanyard for travel and clear hardcase for compact storage - GOLD RECEOVERY EQUIPMENT: Your pocket fine gold recovery kit includes (1) waterproof clear hardcase, (1) magnifying loupe, (2) gold suction droppers, (1) magnification tweezers, (1) black sand separator magnet, (4) glass collection vials - COMPACT STORAGE: The ASR Outdoor pocket gold panning kit conveniently fits all the gold prospecting equipment and tools in the included clear carrying case for secure and compact storage; the case also comes with an included black rope lanyard for easy carrying - TRAVEL FRIENDLY: The small size of this 11 piece gold panning kit, measuring just 4.5 inches wide by 6 inches tall, makes it incredibly travel friendly and easy to tote; whether you're walking to a local gold prospecting site or embarking on a gold mining road trip adventure, the pocket gold panning gold recovery kit will easily fit into any equipment bag, backpack or general travel bag - CATCH GOLD WITH THE RIGHT EQUIPMENT: Gold panning sluice box kit contains tried and true gold prospecting equipment proven to maximize your recovery efforts; Using tools that work will reward the hobbyist gold panner 10x with the price of gold ever increasing, you can count on that === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
